## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Linters pass (`black`, `isort`, `flake8`, `mypy` for backend; `eslint`, `prettier` for frontend)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / ARCHITECTURE / inline) where behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Branch targets `develop` (not `main`)
